name: Dutch Apple Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 23 oz Jar MOTT'S Chunky Apple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and margarine until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
5. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
6. Alternately add the flour mixture and sour cream to the sugar mixture, beating well after each addition.
7. Spread half of the batter in the prepared pan.
8. Top with apple sauce.
9. Drop spoonfuls of remaining batter over the apple sauce.
10. In a small bowl, combine the topping ingredients (brown sugar, flour, cinnamon, and nuts if desired).
11. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the batter.
12. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
